scope: single-seed 16-fixed-state qualification of alternating exact affine-readout variable projection with unchanged backbone, path, capacity and 1024-step budget; no production checkpoint or later Gate

training.envelope_theorem: exact head solve is detached; Adam updates only nonlinear features between solves

decision_rule.pass: qualify one separately frozen 64-state variable-projection memorization test before any production integration
decision_rule.fail: reject alternating exact readout solves; retain the active production head and inspect a compact quotient-mode preconditioner
decision_rule.boundary: This fixed-state mechanism test cannot qualify H1a, initialize production, add steps/seeds, or authorize H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
